definition:
1. easily handled, easy to deal with, easy , εὐχερές ἐστι, with infinitive, (Batrachomyomachia); πάντα ταῦτ᾽ ἐν εὐχερεῖ ἔθου didst make light  of them, (Sophocles Tragicus):—;adverb -ρῶς, (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. of persons, manageable, accommodating, kind, yielding , (Sophocles Tragicus):—;adverb, εὐχερῶς φέρειν (Plato Philosophus), etc.; comparative -έστερον, (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. in bad sense, unscrupulous, reckless , (Demosthenes Orator):—;adverb -ρῶς, (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
